Portfolio / PrimeSpace media
============================

Place your video here so the app can play it on the Home page:
  20260131-2358-02.4484778.mp4

Wire-in: This folder mirrors G:\Portfolio Piece\PrimeSpace Images.
  - Copy 20260131-2358-02.4484778.mp4 from G:\Portfolio Piece\PrimeSpace Images
    into this folder (frontend/public/PrimeSpace-Images/) so the web app can serve it.
  - If the file is too large to fit or commit, use a compressed/short clip here
    and keep the full version in G:\Portfolio Piece\PrimeSpace Images.

The Home page player is responsive (max-height 40vh, object-fit contain) so the
video scales to fit; if the file doesn't fit the folder/size limit, compress or trim.
